title: An Ocular Surface-Targeting Nucleic Acid Hydrogel for Efficient Dry Eye Disease Treatment.
snippet: Dry eye disease (DED) is a prevalent disorder affecting millions worldwide, fueled by both the aging population and extensive use of electronic devices. Yet, current treatments for moderate-to-severe DED fail to fully meet the clinical needs due to the lack of effective therapeutics and delivery systems for topical application.
